title: Rally
excerpt: As a bonus_action Action, you can expend one Superiority Die to bolster the resolve of a companion. Choose an ally of yours within 30 feet of yourself...
markdown:
# Rally

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can expend one Superiority Die to bolster the resolve of a companion. Choose an ally of yours within 30 feet of yourself who can see or hear you. That creature gains [[temporary_hit_points Hit Points]] equal to the Superiority Die roll plus half your Fighter level (round down).
